_comment: Template only. Copy the values you need into appsettings.Development.json (local) or set them as environment variables / host config (production). Do NOT put real secrets in this file or in appsettings.json. Environment variables use the double-underscore form, e.g. ConnectionStrings__MyPetLinkDb, Jwt__SigningKey, Cors__AllowedOrigins__0.
_adminSeedNote: AdminSeed.Emails is a DEVELOPMENT-ONLY convenience allowlist: a Google login with a matching email is auto-promoted to admin. It has no effect outside the Development environment. Leave it empty in production; seed the first production admin manually (docs/deployment/first-admin-setup.md).
